data_text_hipster.inc.gTextHipster_TheyCallMeTheHipster: Hey, yo! They call me the HIPSTER.\nI'll teach you what's hip and happening.
data_text_hipster.inc.gTextHipster_TaughtYouAlready: But, hey, I taught you what's hip and\nhappening already.\pI'd like to spread the good word to\nother folks.
data_text_hipster.inc.gTextHipster_YouAlreadyKnowALot: But, hey, you already know a lot about\nwhat's hip and happening.\pI've got nothing new to teach you!
data_text_hipster.inc.gTextHipster_HaveYouHeardAbout: Hey, have you heard about\n“{STR_VAR_1}”?\pWhat's it mean? Well...\nAsk your daddy or mommy, okay?
